---
title: "10 Calculate 1 Year Stock Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: compute 1-year price change metrics for each ticker.
      # We grab earliest and latest values in the 1-year lookback window.
  oneYr_anchor <-Sys.Date() - 365

stock_1yr <- prices_clean_sorted %>%
 filter(date >= oneYr_anchor)  %>%
   group_by(symbol) %>%
  summarize(
    start_price= first(close),
end_price = last(close),
 dollar_change_1y = end_price - start_price,
   pct_change_1y = end_price/start_price,   # bug: should likely subtract 1 then *100
  .groups = "drop"
    )

 # Intent: preview for validation.
   arrange(stock_1yr, desc(pct_change_1y)) %>% head(10)
```
